socrates.text: Let me verify the solution one more time to be confident before marking complete.

{"command": "cd /app && python3 -c "
from feal import encrypt, create_random_keys, key
from attack import attack
import time

# Run 5 trials to be sure
for trial in range(5):
    create_random_keys()
    true_k5 = key[5]
    start = time.time()
    result = attack(encrypt)
    elapsed = time.time() - start
    assert result == true_k5, f'Trial {trial}: expected {true_k5}, got {result}'
    print(f'Trial {trial}: key[5]={true_k5}, recovered={result}, time={elapsed:.3f}s  OK')
print('All trials passed!')
"
